archetypes.name: Value Seeker
archetypes.one_liner: You buy when the value is obvious, practical, and worth the spend.
at_your_worst: Waits too long and misses fit

daily_reps: Set one purchase rule before browsing
Choose based on total value, not just sticker price
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Buy only items with clear utility + longevity criteria.

rebalance.if_overusing: Add one quality metric to every price decision.
rebalance.if_underusing: Use a simple budget threshold before checkout.

best.why: Value and purpose create stable repeat buying.

risky.risk: Chasing novelty breaks your value discipline.
risky.fix: Create a test budget for experiments.

score_guidance.low: You may buy on emotion first.
score_guidance.mid: You balance value and convenience well.
score_guidance.high: Lead with practical proof and transparent offers.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What is the total value over time?
micro_playbook.team_script: Ask for bundles, guarantees, and plain pricing.
micro_playbook.time_script: Use a 24-hour pause for non-urgent buys.

archetypes.name: Loyal Supporter
archetypes.one_liner: You stick with brands that consistently deliver and treat you right.
at_your_worst: Stays too long with declining service

daily_reps: Notice whether service still matches your standards
weekly_reps: Try one small test purchase elsewhere
Share clear feedback with favorite brands

rebalance.if_overusing: Set non-negotiables and switch when repeatedly broken.

best.why: Trust plus advocacy creates high referral potential.

score_guidance.low: You are likely still evaluating fit.
score_guidance.mid: You can be loyal when quality is proven.
score_guidance.high: Retention and VIP rewards will strongly resonate.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Is this brand still earning my trust?
micro_playbook.team_script: Request loyalty perks tied to consistency.

archetypes.name: Convenience Buyer
archetypes.one_liner: You choose the smoothest path: faster, simpler, less effort.

daily_reps: Use one-click criteria for routine purchases
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Design a personal 'fast but smart' purchase checklist.

rebalance.if_overusing: Pause for 60 seconds on high-ticket buys.
rebalance.if_underusing: Reduce unnecessary decision steps with defaults.

risky.fix: Add a spend cap for experiments.

score_guidance.mid: You balance speed with occasional review.
score_guidance.high: Fast checkout and low-friction rewards matter most.

micro_playbook.decision_script: What gets this done with least friction?
micro_playbook.team_script: Prioritize speed and reliability in service delivery.
micro_playbook.time_script: Reserve deeper research only for major purchases.

archetypes.name: Experience Seeker
archetypes.one_liner: You buy for how it feels: memorable, elevated, and meaningful.

daily_reps: Name what made an experience excellent
Separate core value from surface flair
weekly_reps: Choose one practical and one premium option
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Map experiences that felt worth repeat spending.

rebalance.if_overusing: Anchor every premium buy to a concrete outcome.
rebalance.if_underusing: Invest in one high-quality experience intentionally.

best.why: Memorable choices aligned with personal values.

score_guidance.low: Experience is not your main driver.
score_guidance.mid: You value service when stakes are higher.
score_guidance.high: Personalized moments and premium care convert best.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Will this feel worth remembering next week?
micro_playbook.team_script: Ask for service details before price alone.
micro_playbook.time_script: Schedule premium choices intentionally, not impulsively.

archetypes.name: Social Promoter
archetypes.one_liner: You share what you love and influence others through trusted recommendations.
at_your_worst: Feels pressure to stay publicly consistent

daily_reps: Share one specific reason, not just praise
Recommend only what you would repurchase

rebalance.if_overusing: Slow down and validate before broadcasting.
rebalance.if_underusing: Share one thoughtful recommendation each week.

score_guidance.high: Referral and share incentives will perform strongly.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Would I confidently recommend this to a close friend?
micro_playbook.team_script: Turn experiences into clear, honest testimonials.
micro_playbook.time_script: Batch social sharing after real usage.

archetypes.name: Intentional Buyer
archetypes.one_liner: You buy with purpose, alignment, and long-term fit in mind.

daily_reps: Define one purchase intention before browsing
Check fit against your top values
weekly_reps: Review one purchase for alignment and outcome
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Run a no-impulse buying experiment with a values checklist.

rebalance.if_overusing: Use a decision deadline to avoid stall.
rebalance.if_underusing: Pause and state purpose before each discretionary purchase.

best.why: Purpose plus ROI yields disciplined growth.

risky.fix: Tie emotional spend to practical outcomes.

score_guidance.mid: You apply intention in major purchases.
score_guidance.high: Mission-aligned messaging and transparent impact resonate.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Does this purchase move me toward my priorities?
micro_playbook.team_script: Ask for impact, outcomes, and durability evidence.
micro_playbook.time_script: Use weekly planning for non-essential spending.

archetypes.name: Trend Explorer
archetypes.one_liner: You discover early, test new things, and enjoy what is next.

daily_reps: Tag each new idea: test or commit
Limit exploratory purchases to a set budget
how_to_build.challenge_30_days: Run a structured test log for all new buys.

rebalance.if_overusing: Apply a wait period before buying emerging products.
rebalance.if_underusing: Pilot one new option monthly to stay current.

risky.fix: Pre-commit a discovery budget and criteria.

score_guidance.high: New drops, exclusives, and early-access hooks will convert.

micro_playbook.decision_script: Is this trend a test, tool, or distraction?
micro_playbook.team_script: Separate exploratory spend from core spend.
micro_playbook.time_script: Review test outcomes bi-weekly before repeating purchases.
